negative: fine intricate detail that vanishes at small sizes
clusters of tiny sparkles, dots or particles that read as noise on a phone
washed-out pastel or muddy desaturated colors
thin wire-like lines or black outlines
text or letters unless the description explicitly requests them
extra objects or filled empty space beyond the described subject

phrases.finish: glossy sculpted finish with airbrushed polish and flawless smooth gradients — premium, satisfying, high-value feel, restrained not gaudy; clean pure solid colors; one crisp specular pop per object plus a subtle top sheen band; zero noise, zero texture grain; decorative particles are rationed: at most one or two LARGE sparkles, never a cloud of small ones
phrases.lighting: single key light from the top with strong clear highlights, a bright thin rim light along the upper edges, gentle ambient occlusion in crevices, and a soft round contact shadow directly beneath the object
phrases.rendering: premium mobile casual-game UI asset DESIGNED FOR SMALL PHONE SCREENS: it must read instantly at 48px — one big simple form, minimal interior detail, exaggerated size of the key feature, strong tonal contrast between the subject and its parts; semi-painted render with a stylized baked texture look — hand-painted lighting baked onto clean 3D-like volumes, bold chunky silhouette; subject matter strictly neutral premium motifs — stars, gems, coins, medals, ribbons, laurels, sparkles — absolutely no animals, characters, mascots, brands, or licensed shapes
phrases.shape: rounded, hand-rolled chunky silhouettes with subtle asymmetry (never sterile mathematical geometry); smooth rounded outer edges with a few bold, crisp internal details (never many small ones); every object closed by a thin outline in a darker shade of its own fill color (never black); centered single subject with generous breathing room

sources: hand-authored gold standard 2026-07-16 (Batu-directed), grounded in ai_asset style_tokens (Casual Style Dictionary / Banana2) + web research in design/PROMPT-RESEARCH.md; design/style-guide.ingest-baseline.json holds the raw ingest output from design/refs/*.png for tool evaluation
